sentence: 他能用流利的英语与外国客人交谈。
pinyin: Tā néng yòng liúlì de Yīngyǔ yǔ wàiguó kèrén jiāotán.
english: He can converse with foreign guests in fluent English.

pinyin: Jiàoshì lǐ yǒu yī pái xīn zhuōzi.
english: There is a row of new desks in the classroom.

sentence: 服务器需要处理大量的数据流。
pinyin: Fúwùqì xūyào chǔlǐ dàliàng de shùjùliú.
english: The server needs to process a large volume of data streams.

sentence: 这座建筑颇具历史价值。
pinyin: Zhè zuò jiànzhú pō jù lìshǐ jiàzhí.
english: This building has considerable historical value.

sentence: 一位教士在教堂门口迎接信徒。
pinyin: Yī wèi jiàoshì zài jiàotáng ménkǒu yíngjiē xìntú.
english: A clergyman welcomed the congregation at the church door.
